lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Mihi ignosce. Cum homine de cane debeo congredi. (Excuse me. I've got to meet up with a man about a dog.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Errare humanum est. (Making mistakes is human.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Die dulci freure. (Have a nice day.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Carpe Diem! (Seize the day!)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Te audire non possum. Musa sapientum fixa est in aure. (I can't hear you. I have a banana stuck in my ear.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Furnulum pani nolo. (I don't want a toaster.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Fac ut gaudeam. (Make me happy.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Utinam barbari spatium proprium tuum invadant! (May barbarians invade your personal space!)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Quantum materiae materietur marmota monax si marmota monax materiam possit materiari? (How much wood would a woodchuck chuck if a woodchuck could chuck wood?)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Sona si Latine loqueris. (Honk if you speak Latin.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Raptus Regaliter (Royally screwed.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Nemo dat quod non habet. (No one gives what he does not have.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Ne auderis delere orbem rigidum meum! (Ne auderis delere orbem rigidum meum!)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Da mihi sis bubulae frustum assae, solana tuberosa in modo gallico fricta, ac quassum lactatum coagulatum crassum. (Give me a hamburger, french fries, and a thick shake.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Cogito ergo sum. (I think, therefore I am.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Vacca foeda. (Stupid cow.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Di! Ecce hora! Uxor mea me necabit! (Oh gods! Look at the time! My wife will kill me!)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Latine loqui coactus sum. (I am compulsed to speak Latin.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Cave ne ante ullas catapultas ambules. (Beware not to walk in front of any catapults.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Fac ut vivas! (Get a life!)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Noli me vocare, ego te vocabo. (I don't want you to call me, I'll call you.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Meliora cogito. (I strive for the best.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Braccae tuae aperiuntur. (Your fly is open.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Vescere bracis meis. (Eat my shorts.)

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Corripe cervisiam! (Seize the beer!)

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you insulting me in Latin?

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm...
